zh.Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾巴德斯利 克林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Ferrers IV於1442年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾時，他的父親Sir Thomas de Ferrers47歲，母親Elizabeth Freville45歲。他於1460年與Margaret Hexstall在英國瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1499年12月28日在英國瓦維其可爾巴德斯利 克林頓享年57歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾巴德斯利 克林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Ferrers IV于1442年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾时，他的父亲Sir Thomas de Ferrers47岁，母亲Elizabeth Freville45岁。他于1460年与Margaret Hexstall在英国瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1499年12月28日在英国瓦維其可爾巴德斯利 克林頓享年57岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾巴德斯利 克林頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Ferrers IV was born in 1442, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas de Ferrers, was 47 and his mother, Elizabeth Freville, was 45. He married Margaret Hexstall in 1460, in Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 28 December 1499, in Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Ferrers IV est né en 1442, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas de Ferrers, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Freville, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Hexstall en 1460, à Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 28 décembre 1499, à Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

Er hat 1460 in Warwickshire, England Margaret Hexstall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Dezember 1499 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, England und wurde in Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret Hexstall nel 1460, nel Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Ferrers IVが1442年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Ferrersは47歳，母Elizabeth Frevilleは45歳であった。1460年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでMargaret Hexstallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1499年12月28日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアバッドエスリー クリントンで57歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアバッドエスリー クリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Ferrers IV(이)가 1442년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Ferrers(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Freville(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1460년 영국 워윅실르에서 Margaret Hexstall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1499년 12월 28일 영국 워윅실르 바데슬리 클린턴에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 바데슬리 클린턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Ferrers IV nasceu em 1442, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Ferrers, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Freville, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Hexstall em 1460, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de dezembro de 1499, em Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Ferrers IV родился в 1442 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Ferrers было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Freville, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Hexstall в 1460 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 28 декабря 1499 г. в местности баддесли клинтон, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности баддесли клинтон, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Ferrers IV nació en 1442, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas de Ferrers, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Freville, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Margaret Hexstall en 1460, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 28 de diciembre de 1499, en Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
